records.name: Ghostline Lattice
records.summary: A subdermal signal-masking weave that blurs quick biometric scans.

records.name: Mercury Tendons
records.summary: Reactive synthetic muscle filaments that turn parkour into controlled violence.

records.name: Cinder Eye
records.summary: A black-market optic with thermal ghosting and short-term evidence buffering.

details.drawback: stores incriminating footage if not purged

records.name: Pulsehook Fingers
records.summary: Tactile fingertips tuned for lockwork, data taps, and contact poison delivery.

details.drawback: poor fine sensation in cold weather

records.name: Patchbay Halo
records.summary: A cranial rig that hot-swaps external chips and custom neural modules.

records.name: Hushlung
records.summary: A filtered lung replacement built for smoke, spores, and industrial poison.

records.name: Velvet Jaw
records.summary: A cosmetic mandibular replacement hiding mono-filament garrotes and voiceprint spoofers.

records.name: Saint Wire
records.summary: Emergency trauma filaments that can stitch arterial damage for a few desperate minutes.
